rationale: The proposed increase to the Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption concerns property tax appraisal value reductions. Fam. Code §264.121 governs transitional living services for foster youth aging out of care. The two provisions address entirely unrelated subject matters with no intersecting operative requirements.
quote: The department shall address the unique challenges facing foster children in the conservatorship of the department who must transition to independent living
_note: No conflict found. The rule text (Fam. Code §264.121) pertains solely to foster care transitional living services and contains no reference to property tax, homestead exemptions, or Tax Code §11.13.
